Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp

Interface McpTypedPromptHandler<A>

Type Parameters:
A - Argument bean type.
public interface McpTypedPromptHandler<A>
Typed variant of McpPromptHandler where MCP prompts/get arguments bind into a Juneau bean.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Class<A>
    argumentType()
    Returns the runtime argument class for binding.
    Prompt
    descriptor()
    Returns the static descriptor for this prompt.
    GetPromptResult
    get(A arguments, BeanStore ctx)
    Renders the prompt.

  • Method Details

    • descriptor

      Prompt descriptor()
      Returns the static descriptor for this prompt.
      Returns:
      The prompt descriptor. Never null.

    • argumentType

      Class<A> argumentType()
      Returns the runtime argument class for binding.
      Returns:
      The argument class. Never null.

    • get

      GetPromptResult get(A arguments, BeanStore ctx)
      Renders the prompt.
      Parameters:
      arguments - Bound argument bean (may be null when no arguments are supplied).
      ctx - Per-request bean store.
      Returns:
      The rendered prompt.
